====================================================================================================
PCPP - A C99 Preprocessor Written in Pure Python
====================================================================================================

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
PCPP is not part of the JxMake program and is not covered by JxMake licenses.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The PCPP script files in this directory and its subdirectories were downloaded from the GitHub
repositories:

    https://github.com/ned14/pcpp
    https://github.com/ned14/pcpp/archive/refs/heads/master.zip

    https://github.com/ned14/ply/tree/fbc7a3cbc6e57d18462453dc65ba2c985fd6ac21
    https://github.com/ned14/ply/archive/fbc7a3cbc6e57d18462453dc65ba2c985fd6ac21.zip

Some files and directories that are not strictly required for the use of the program are not
included here to save space.

The function:
    preprocessor.py/macro_expand_args()
has been modified to remove whitespaces after the token pasting operator (##).

~~~ Last accessed & checked on 2024-07-05 ~~~

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Please refer to 'LICENSE.txt' and 'ply/README.md' file for the license details.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

====================================================================================================
